profile.traits: Full-stack engineer • Backend specialist • Product-focused developer • Workflow optimizer
profile.aboutMeHtml:
I’m a Nigerian full-stack software engineer focused on building scalable business applications, financial systems, internal tools, and modern digital products. My strongest areas are Django, React, Flutter, APIs, backend architecture, and product workflow design.

I enjoy turning complex operational problems into systems that are simple to use, maintainable for teams, and reliable in production. Most of my work sits at the intersection of product thinking, backend engineering, automation, and user experience.

I’ve worked on investment platforms, savings and loan systems, CMS architectures, mobile applications, internal business dashboards, and deployment infrastructure. I care a lot about clean architecture, continuity, performance, and building products that businesses can actually grow with.

projects.summary: Ginns Works is a Centralized document storage with version control, access management, and collaboration tools. It features Real-time tracking and monitoring of document status, approvals, and movements.

Estefarya is an Hair Transplant Clinic in Turkey. The website features reusable CMS-driven frontend components with configurable content blocks, dynamic layouts, scoped styling, FAQs, pricing sections, testimonials, and flexible content management for non-technical teams.

Bulqe is the product data layer where suppliers and stores connect, keep titles, prices and SKUs in sync across every CMS, and scale faster with AI‑assisted bulk editing. IDMC is the AI‑powered product information management system that helps brands and retailers keep their product data clean, consistent, and up to date across every channel. It features a user-friendly interface, secure authentication, real-time updates, and seamless integration with backend services to foster a supportive and interactive experience.

When Wives Pray and Care (WWPC) is a community of Christian wives united in prayer, love, and sisterhood. The WWPC mobile app provides a platform for members to connect, share prayer requests and daily pills, access resources, and engage in spiritual growth together. It features a user-friendly interface, secure authentication, real-time updates, and seamless integration with backend services to foster a supportive and interactive community experience.

A mobile application for financial management and loan services, featuring user-friendly interfaces, secure authentication, real-time data synchronization, and seamless integration with backend APIs for a smooth user experience. made for Elevate Alliance LTD a Nigerian microfinance bank focused on providing accessible financial solutions to individuals and businesses within Ondo State, Nigeria. manages loan applications, repayments, and financial tracking, and provides an investment platform.

gallery.title: Perspective & Perseverance
gallery.caption: Finding balance and fresh perspectives on the trails. I find that long hikes are a lot like coding—success is all about pacing and persistence.

gallery.title: National Service Milestone
gallery.caption: Successfully completing my service year. A rewarding experience focused on community impact, discipline, and professional growth.

gallery.title: New Beginnings
gallery.caption: Celebrating traditions and looking forward to new technical challenges. I value these moments of community and shared goals.
